TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Korea iga-miladay tu dietu,2017 == Korea iga ťüďŚúčťõĽŚĹĪ "ŤąáÁ•ěŚźĆŤ°Ć " sapuelac nu Hulam aut Amilika: (Hulam)" . (Amilika)Along With the Gods: The Two Worlds (Hangul: žč†Í≥ľŪē®ÍĽė-ž£ĄžôÄ Ž≤Ć; RR: Sin gwa Hamkke - Joe wa Beol; lit. "God with Together - Sin and Punishment") is a 2017 South Korean fantasy drama film directed by Kim Yong-hwa and based on a webcomic by Joo Ho-min. The film will be released in two parts, and stars Ha Jung-woo, Cha Tae-hyun, Ju Ji-hoon and Kim Hyang-gi. The first part of the film was released on December 20, 2017. belih nu Sakizay: namatahkal i 2007 a mihcan a iga nu Korea, kya kungku namisulit ni ZhouHao. ci Jin Cehong, amipauzip cacay wawana ciniza, uyzasa mapatay i lamal. sisa, tayza tu ciniza i la'cusay a kitakit. siwkay nu iga: u baeketay nu uzip sa, caay kaw tanaya' ku uzip nu misu, u cucuk nu balucu' i zazan nu uzip nu misu, uyzaan maala atu masubeliday i balucu' nu misu. (Amilika)What matters the most in life is never how long you can live, but how much love you receive and leave behind. uniyan a sizumaay a iga sa, namakay misumad nay banga nu Korea "miladay tu dietu" " . u kungku musakamu, izaw ku cacay matalulay a papanengayay ci Jincehung, amipauzip tu tademaw sa, mapatay i kawaw niza. namapatay ciniza sa, tayzatu ciniza i duutay a kitakit. tayni militemuh ku tulu caculculen. cacacacay a mapatayay a tademaw, ilaed 49 a demiad, amicaliw pitu a liclic . anu malakuid ku liclic, taneng ciniza tatiku u uzipay a kitakit, anusa caay malakuid ku liclic, atayza ciniza i la'cusay a kitakit. .
S.PHON: == kor…ôa iga-mir~…ĺadaj tu di…ôtu,**** == kor…ôa iga **** "**** " sapu…ôr~…ĺa ¶ nu ńßur~…ĺam aut amir~…ĺika: (ńßur~…ĺam)" . (amir~…ĺika)ar~…ĺoŇč witńß tńß…ô gods: tńß…ô two worr~…ĺds (ńßaŇčur~…ĺ: ****-** *; **: sin gwa ńßamkk…ô - *o…ô wa b…ôor~…ĺ; r~…ĺit. "god witńß tog…ôtńß…ôr - sin and punisńßm…ônt") is a **** soutńß kor…ôan fantasj drama fir~…ĺm dir…ô ¶t…ôd bj kim joŇč-ńßwa and bas…ôd on a w…ôb ¶omi ¶ bj *oo ńßo-min. tńß…ô fir~…ĺm wir~…ĺr~…ĺ b…ô r…ôr~…ĺ…ôas…ôd in two parts, and stars ńßa *uŇč-woo, ¶ńßa ta…ô-ńßjun, *u *i-ńßoon and kim ńßjaŇč-gi. tńß…ô first part of tńß…ô fir~…ĺm was r…ôr~…ĺ…ôas…ôd on d…ô ¶…ômb…ôr **, ****. b…ôr~…ĺińß nu sakizaj: namatańßkar~…ĺ i **** a mińß ¶an a iga nu kor…ôa, kja kuŇčku namisur~…ĺit ni zńßouńßao. ¶i *in ¶…ôńßoŇč, amipauzip ¶a ¶aj wawana ¶iniza, ujzasa mapataj i r~…ĺamar~…ĺ. sisa, tajza tu ¶iniza i r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a kitakit. siwkaj nu iga: u ba…ôk…ôtaj nu uzip sa, ¶aaj kaw tanaja Ē~ ° ku uzip nu misu, u ¶u ¶uk nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° i zazan nu uzip nu misu, ujzaan maar~…ĺa atu masub…ôr~…ĺidaj i bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu misu. (amir~…ĺika)wńßat matt…ôrs tńß…ô most in r~…ĺif…ô is n…ô*…ôr ńßow r~…ĺoŇč jou ¶an r~…ĺi*…ô, but ńßow mu ¶ńß r~…ĺo*…ô jou r…ô ¶…ôi*…ô and r~…ĺ…ôa*…ô b…ôńßind. unijan a sizumaaj a iga sa, namakaj misumad naj baŇča nu kor…ôa "mir~…ĺadaj tu di…ôtu" " . u kuŇčku musakamu, izaw ku ¶a ¶aj matar~…ĺur~…ĺaj a papan…ôŇčajaj ¶i *in ¶…ôńßuŇč, amipauzip tu tad…ômaw sa, mapataj i kawaw niza. namapataj ¶iniza sa, tajzatu ¶iniza i duutaj a kitakit. tajni mir~…ĺit…ômuńß ku tur~…ĺu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ…ôn. ¶a ¶a ¶a ¶aj a mapatajaj a tad…ômaw, ir~…ĺa…ôd ** a d…ômiad, ami ¶ar~…ĺiw pitu a r~…ĺi ¶r~…ĺi ¶ . anu mar~…ĺakuid ku r~…ĺi ¶r~…ĺi ¶, tan…ôŇč ¶iniza tatiku u uzipaj a kitakit, anusa ¶aaj mar~…ĺakuid ku r~…ĺi ¶r~…ĺi ¶, atajza ¶iniza i r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a kitakit. .
S.FORM: == Korea iga-miladay tu dietu,2017 == Korea iga ťüďŚúčťõĽŚĹĪ "ŤąáÁ•ěŚźĆŤ°Ć " sapuelac nu Hulam aut Amilika: (Hulam)" . (Amilika)Along With the Gods: The Two Worlds (Hangul: žč†Í≥ľŪē®ÍĽė-ž£ĄžôÄ Ž≤Ć; RR: Sin gwa Hamkke - Joe wa Beol; lit. "God with Together - Sin and Punishment") is a 2017 South Korean fantasy drama film directed by Kim Yong-hwa and based on a webcomic by Joo Ho-min. The film will be released in two parts, and stars Ha Jung-woo, Cha Tae-hyun, Ju Ji-hoon and Kim Hyang-gi. The first part of the film was released on December 20, 2017. belih nu Sakizay: namatahkal i 2007 a mihcan a iga nu Korea, kya kungku namisulit ni ZhouHao. ci Jin Cehong, amipauzip cacay wawana ciniza, uyzasa mapatay i lamal. sisa, tayza tu ciniza i la'cusay a kitakit. siwkay nu iga: u baeketay nu uzip sa, caay kaw tanaya' ku uzip nu misu, u cucuk nu balucu' i zazan nu uzip nu misu, uyzaan maala atu masubeliday i balucu' nu misu. (Amilika)What matters the most in life is never how long you can live, but how much love you receive and leave behind. uniyan a sizumaay a iga sa, namakay misumad nay banga nu Korea "miladay tu dietu" " . u kungku musakamu, izaw ku cacay matalulay a papanengayay ci Jincehung, amipauzip tu tademaw sa, mapatay i kawaw niza. namapatay ciniza sa, tayzatu ciniza i duutay a kitakit. tayni militemuh ku tulu caculculen. cacacacay a mapatayay a tademaw, ilaed 49 a demiad, amicaliw pitu a liclic . anu malakuid ku liclic, taneng ciniza tatiku u uzipay a kitakit, anusa caay malakuid ku liclic, atayza ciniza i la'cusay a kitakit. .

"god witńß tog…ôtńß…ôr - sin and punisńßm…ônt") is a **** soutńß kor…ôan fantasj drama fir~…ĺm dir…ô ¶t…ôd bj kim joŇč-ńßwa and bas…ôd on a w…ôb ¶omi ¶ bj *oo ńßo-min. tńß…ô fir~…ĺm wir~…ĺr~…ĺ b…ô r…ôr~…ĺ…ôas…ôd in two parts, and stars ńßa *uŇč-woo, ¶ńßa ta…ô-ńßjun, *u *i-ńßoon and kim ńßjaŇč-gi. tńß…ô first part of tńß…ô fir~…ĺm was r…ôr~…ĺ…ôas…ôd on d…ô ¶…ômb…ôr **, ****. b…ôr~…ĺińß nu sakizaj: namatańßkar~…ĺ i **** a mińß ¶an a iga nu kor…ôa, kja kuŇčku namisur~…ĺit ni zńßouńßao. ¶i *in ¶…ôńßoŇč, amipauzip ¶a ¶aj wawana ¶iniza, ujzasa mapataj i r~…ĺamar~…ĺ. sisa, tajza tu ¶iniza i r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a kitakit. siwkaj nu iga: u ba…ôk…ôtaj nu uzip sa, ¶aaj kaw tanaja Ē~ ° ku uzip nu misu, u ¶u ¶uk nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° i zazan nu uzip nu misu, ujzaan maar~…ĺa atu masub…ôr~…ĺidaj i bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu misu.
